title: Stay or go - at 28, Rashford faces big Man Utd call
summary: Marcus Rashford returns from the World Cup facing uncertainty about his future at Manchester United. The England star must decide whether to remain with the club or pursue a new opportunity. His decision carries significance for both his career trajectory and United's squad planning.
content: The World Cup is over, and Marcus Rashford returns home not knowing if his future at club level lies with Manchester United.

zh.title: 留下还是离开 - 28岁的拉什福德面临曼联重大决定
zh.summary: 拉什福德从世界杯返回，面临曼联未来的不确定性。这位英格兰球星必须决定是否继续留在俱乐部或寻求新机会。他的决定对其职业发展轨迹和曼联的阵容规划都具有重要意义。

title: Scottish clubs to learn European qualifying opponents
summary: Hearts, Rangers, Motherwell, and Hibernian will learn their European qualifying opponents on Monday when the third-round draws take place for the Champions League, Europa League, and Conference League. The draw will determine which clubs each Scottish team faces in their European pursuit.
content: Hearts, Rangers, Motherwell and Hibernian await news of potential European opponents on Monday when the third qualifying round draws are made for the Champions League, Europa League and Conference League.

zh.title: 苏格兰俱乐部将了解欧战资格赛对手
zh.summary: 周一进行欧冠、欧联杯和欧洲协会杯第三轮抽签时，哈茨、流浪者、莫瑟韦尔和希伯尼安将了解他们的欧战资格赛对手。抽签将决定每支苏格兰球队在欧战中面对的对手。

title: Mbappe wins race for the 2026 World Cup golden boot
summary: Kylian Mbappe leads the 2026 World Cup golden boot race ahead of Lionel Messi, Jude Bellingham, and Erling Haaland. His prolific goal-scoring performance underscores his status as one of football's premier strikers. The competition for individual accolades reflects the tournament's high-caliber talent.
content: All the goals from the race for the 2026 World Cup golden boot as Kylian Mbappe leads the way from Lionel Messi, Jude Bellingham and Erling Haaland.

zh.title: 姆巴佩赢得2026年世界杯金靴奖争夺
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在2026年世界杯金靴奖争夺中领先梅西、贝林厄姆和哈兰德。他的高效进球表现突显了他作为足坛顶级前锋的地位。个人荣誉的竞争反映了本届赛事聚集的高水平人才。

title: Podcast: World Cup lessons & Celtic's transfer standstill
summary: A podcast explores how the World Cup has reshaped football and examines why Celtic supporters are losing patience with the club's transfer inactivity. The episode addresses both the tournament's broader impact and the Scottish club's specific market challenges.
content: What has the World Cup changed - and why are Celtic fans losing patience?

zh.title: 播客：世界杯课程与凯尔特人转会停滞
zh.summary: 一档播客节目探讨了世界杯如何重塑足球，并分析了为什么凯尔特人球迷对俱乐部转会不活跃失去耐心。该集节目涉及锦标赛的广泛影响和苏格兰俱乐部特定的市场挑战。

title: Celtic revive chase for striker Hogh - gossip
summary: Celtic has revived its interest in Norway-based striker Hogh and is simultaneously pursuing a new goalkeeper. The club's transfer activity signals efforts to bolster attacking and defensive depth ahead of the upcoming season.
content: Celtic rekindle interest in Norway-based striker and receive encouragement in hunt for a new goalkeeper...

zh.title: 凯尔特人重振对锋线球员霍赫的追逐 - 传言
zh.summary: 凯尔特人重新启动了对挪威前锋霍赫的追求，同时也在寻找新门将。俱乐部的转会活动表明为即将到来的赛季加强进攻和防守深度的努力。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 43
summary: A guessing game challenges readers to identify a World Cup star player through limited clues. The puzzle tests fans' knowledge of the tournament's prominent figures and memorable performances.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯之星43号
zh.summary: 一个猜谜游戏通过有限的线索挑战读者识别一位世界杯明星球员。这个谜题考验球迷对锦标赛著名人物和难忘表现的了解。

title: Lamine Yamal 'completes football' at 19 as Argentina betray Messi
summary: Spain's Lamine Yamal wins the 2026 World Cup at just 19 years old, capping a dominant tournament performance. The victory comes at the expense of Argentina and a tearful conclusion to Lionel Messi's World Cup career.
content: Spain's Lamine Yamal takes the glory of World Cup victory as the great Lionel Messi's evening ends in tears.

zh.title: 拉米内·亚马尔19岁"完成足球"，阿根廷背弃梅西
zh.summary: 西班牙的拉米内·亚马尔仅在19岁时赢得2026年世界杯，为其主导的锦标赛表现画上句号。这场胜利是以阿根廷为代价，也为莱昂内尔·梅西的世界杯生涯画上了泪水的结局。

title: Sixteen titles in five years - why Spain are a dominant force
summary: Spain becomes the first nation to simultaneously hold men's and women's World Cup titles, highlighting their emergence as a dominant force in international football. The achievement reflects systemic strength across both competitions.
content: We look at what's behind Spain's dominance after they become the first nation to be men's and women's World Cup champions at the same time.

zh.title: 五年十六个冠军——西班牙为何是足球强国
zh.summary: 西班牙成为首个同时拥有男子和女子世界杯冠军的国家，突出了其在国际足球中作为强势力量的崛起。这一成就反映了在两项赛事中的系统性优势。

title: Trump, Bieber and Shakira - a World Cup final like never before
summary: The 2026 World Cup final featured unprecedented celebrity moments including appearances by President Trump, Madonna, Shakira, and Justin Bieber during a record-length half-time show. The spectacle may overshadow the actual match in public memory.
content: The 2026 World Cup final may not linger long in the memory for what happened on the pitch but it will for all that surrounded it, with an appearance by President Trump, the longest half-time in football and songs by a host of stars.

zh.title: 特朗普、比伯和夏奇拉——前所未有的世界杯决赛
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯决赛期间出现了前所未有的名人时刻，包括特朗普总统、麦当娜、夏奇拉和贾斯汀·比伯在创纪录长度的中场表演中亮相。这场盛会可能会在公众记忆中盖过实际比赛。

title: Scaloni leaves news conference in tears talking about his future
summary: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni tearfully exits his post-match press conference following Spain's World Cup final victory, expressing uncertainty about his future with the national team. The emotional departure underscores the weight of the defeat.
content: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni leaves his post-match news conference after Sunday's World Cup final defeat by Spain in tears.

zh.title: 斯卡洛尼泪流满面离开新闻发布会，谈论未来
zh.summary: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼在西班牙赢得世界杯决赛后，在赛后新闻发布会上泪流满面地离开，对自己与国家队的前景表示了不确定。这一充满情感的离场突显了失利的沉重打击。

title: Victory for football? Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup
summary: Spain defeats Argentina 1-0 to win the World Cup, with the result earning broad neutral support as a victory for football itself. The triumph caps Spain's dominant tournament run.
content: It might seem like a trite cliche, but you won't find many neutrals disagreeing with that verdict on the World Cup final.

zh.title: 足球的胜利？西班牙击败阿根廷赢得世界杯
zh.summary: 西班牙以1-0击败阿根廷赢得世界杯，这一结果获得了广泛的中立支持，被视为足球本身的胜利。这场胜利为西班牙在锦标赛中的统治表现画上了句号。

title: 'The reaction is terrible' - World Cup final turns ugly at full-time
summary: Argentina players' frustration boils over at full-time after losing the World Cup final to Spain in extra time, with the match taking an ugly turn at its conclusion. The emotional reaction reflects the devastating nature of the defeat.
content: The frustration of some Argentina players boils over at the end of the 2026 World Cup final, after the 2022 winners are beaten by Spain in extra time.

zh.title: "反应很糟糕"——世界杯决赛终场时局面失控
zh.summary: 在加时赛中输给西班牙的世界杯决赛终场哨响时，阿根廷球员的沮丧情绪爆发，比赛结束时气氛变得令人不快。这一情感反应反映了这场失利的毁灭性。
